title: DeviceStatusPayload
description: Payload for device_status events: logged when a hardware device connects, disconnects, or changes state

device_name.description: Logical device name as reported by DeviceManager (e.g. 'drive_L', 'turret', 'ultrasonic')

voltage_mv.description: Battery voltage in millivolts, merged in by the EV3 liveness heartbeat (PEN-234) — same field/shape as battery_status.voltage_mv, present only on heartbeat device_status events that carry battery state

percentage.description: Estimated remaining battery charge as a percentage, merged in by the EV3 liveness heartbeat (PEN-234) — see voltage_mv

voltage_v.description: Battery voltage in volts, merged in by the EV3 liveness heartbeat (PEN-234) — see voltage_mv

is_critical.description: True when voltage is below the low-battery threshold, merged in by the EV3 liveness heartbeat (PEN-234) — see voltage_mv

battery_type.description: Physical battery type installed, merged in by the EV3 liveness heartbeat (PEN-234) — see voltage_mv
